---
title: "Questions 3 & 7"
author: "Kyran Lakhia"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---
#
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
lc_data <- read_csv("lc_2016_2017.csv")
lc_data$grade <- factor(lc_data$grade, levels = c("A", "B", "C", "D", "E", "F", "G"))
lc_data$addr_state <- factor(lc_data$addr_state)
lc_data$purpose <- factor(lc_data$purpose)
Question 3 Chart:
ggplot(
  summarize(
    group_by(lc_data, grade),
    avg_int_rate = mean(int_rate, na.rm = TRUE)
  ),
  aes(x = grade, y = avg_int_rate)
) +
  geom_col() +
  labs(
    title = "Average Interest Rate by Loan Grade",
    x = "Loan Grade",
    y = "Average Interest Rate"
  )
Question 7 Chart:
ggplot(lc_data, aes(x = addr_state, fill = purpose)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  labs(
    title = "Proportion of Loan Purposes by State",
    x = "State",
    y = "Proportion of Loans",
    fill = "Loan Purpose"
  )
